arts.ttl: Adele and Man Utd - Southgate's Desert Island Discs
arts.sum: Former England manager Gareth Southgate explains why he chose Adele's Someone Like You as one of his tracks on the latest episode of Desert Island Discs.

arts.ttl: Barcelona reject offer to sign Manchester United star in January
arts.sum: Barcelona boss Hansi Flick is not interested in a January transfer move for Manchester United star Alejandro Garnacho. La Blaugrana could bolster their first team squad in the mid-season market but Flick will have a limited budget to work with. Despite the likelihood of Garnacho commanding a huge transfer fee, his future at Manchester United […] The post Barcelona reject offer to sign Manchester United star in January appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire 'offered Man United escape route' by Italian giants as Serie A reunion mooted
arts.sum: Serie A title chasers Napoli reportedly eye a free transfer for Manchester United's Harry Maguire, who is free to talk to foreign clubs in January.

arts.ttl: Fresh blow for Marcus Rashford as Love Island star Grace Jackson 'dumps him after realising the Man United forward wasn't serious about their relationship'
arts.sum: Man United forward Marcus Rashford has reportedly been dumped by former Love Island contestant Grace Jackson, with the star claimed to have 'not been serious about the relationship'.

arts.ttl: Arsenal given clear Man United 'sacrifice' instruction Ruben Amorim will love amid injury crisis
arts.sum: Arsenal old boy Paul Merson has suggested his former team 'sacrifice' their FA Cup tie with Manchester United in January

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford 'dumped by Love Island girlfriend' as she cuts ties for new TV show
arts.sum: Manchester United forward Marcus Rashford has reportedly been dating Love Island star Grace Jackson, but they are no longer together with the latter preparing to return to the hit show

arts.ttl: Manchester United players at risk of suspension: Defensive duo and midfielder in danger of ban
arts.sum: Ruben Amorim has some key players in danger of being suspended over Christmas

arts.ttl: Wayne Rooney takes aim at 'naive' Plymouth players as ex-Man Utd team-mate has last laugh
arts.sum: Wayne Rooney saw his Plymouth side lead three times against Middlesbrough before eventually drawing a six-goal thriller, which saw the Pilgrims slip to the bottom of the Championship

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford: Three clubs preparing everything to strike a deal
arts.sum: Marcus Rashford looks increasingly likely to leave Manchester United for the Saudi Pro League during the January transfer window. Three Saudi clubs are positioning themselves to sign the England international, with former Chelsea sporting director Michael Emenalo having been placed in charge of finding him a club.

arts.ttl: Marcus Rashford Named 'Unbelievable' British Star as Toughest Opponent of his Career
arts.sum: These two have gone to battle over the years in some of the biggest games in the Premier League.
